nasb.text: Being deeply grieved, they each one began to say to Him, “Surely not I, Lord?”

esv.text: And they were very sorrowful and began to say to him one after another, “Is it I, Lord?”

cnv.text: 他們就很憂愁，一個一個地問他：“主啊，是我嗎？”

ccb.text: 他们都非常忧愁，相继追问耶稣，说：“主啊，肯定不是我吧？”

csbs.text: 他们极其忧伤，就一个一个地开始问耶稣：“主啊，不会是我吧？”
